scripts.build: npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate deploy && npm run seed:admin && npm run build --workspace=@impeasy/api
scripts.start: npm run build --workspace=@impeasy/api && npm run start --workspace=@impeasy/api
scripts.seed:all: npm run seed:admin && npm run seed:mvp-010-users && npm run seed:mvp-020-demo && npm run seed:mvp-030-demo && npm run seed:kiosk-ready && npm run seed:mvp-040-demo
